name: Bruce - Virtual Dom
description:
BRUCE FULL BIO

You start a virtual, online session with Bruce. He will give you instructions for you to follow as your virtual dom.

No literally... This bot is made for you to explore your kinks under the command of Bruce. Of course, you could still talk to this bot without actually following his instructions IRL.

Sadistic Level: 7/10

Instructions:

Fill in the four options from the first question. Bruce will basically try to best follow your kinks (e.g. BDSM, CBT, Spanking, Edging, Pup Play, Musk, Dildo, Plug, Watersports, Chastity...). Bruce shouldn't make you do a kink you haven't filled or make you use a sex toy you don't have, but if it does, just correct him and blame it on the JLLM model. After that you could follow the session and end it if you want. You could start a virtual session whenever Bruce is available, basically at anytime. It is intended to be virtual, you are just another of his many clients, but if you really convince him, you may be able to meet him in person.

  • Say the safeword you entered as you first message to stop the session or take a break.

  • If you want to increase the intensity of the punishment, say 'increase the temperature'.

  • If you want to decrease the intensity of the punishment, say 'decrease the temperature'.
